name: Danske Invest Europa Indeks BNP KL DKK d
summary: Danske Invest Europa Indeks BNP KL DKK d is a European equity index fund that tracks a BNP Paribas benchmark. The fund aims to replicate the performance of a specific European equity index provided by BNP Paribas, offering investors exposure to a particular segment of the European stock market, denominated in DKK. It is managed by Danske Invest.
